sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56547" key="ke/ndula" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κένδῡλα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, also <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κένδῡλα</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κενδύλη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, dub.l.for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σχενδύλα</foreign> (q.v.).</entryFree>
